desc: Building an open-source, DPGA-recognized Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) layer to enable scalable, secure, and efficient G2P fund transfers for national-level deployments.

Building distributed microservices with FastAPI, Kubernetes, and Helm for nation-scale deployments — migrating legacy Odoo monoliths, shipping shared auth and middleware primitives, and working with government stakeholders on G2P benefit delivery systems.

Focused on developing high‑performant computational combustion models for heterogeneous composite propellants, implementing Python/Cantera (v3.x) kinetics solvers to evaluate 1‑D reaction-zone behavior with variants burn‑rate law. Built a artificial neural network to predict charge burn rates from initial data of physical conditions & propellant chemical compositions.
